case_title: CHARLES M OWEN VS. STEPHEN EASTMAN et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT EASTMAN, STEPHEN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
MINUTES FOR FEB-05-2003 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 218
MINUTES FOR FEB-10-2003 11:30 AM FOR DEPT 001

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OWEN, CHARLES M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EASTMAN, STEPHEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 117 28TH STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $2,250.00 RENT, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,420.00, STAYED UNTIL FEB-20-2003, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT JUDGMENT ALSO INCLUDES DAILY DAMAGES OF $1,480.00 AGREED TO BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. WRIT ISSUES FORTHWITH; STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO STAY DATE. ADDITIONAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS APPLY IF AND ONLY IF DEFENDANT VACATES THE PREMISES AS AGREED HEREIN. NOTE, THIS JUDGMENT IS A JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. IT IS NOT AN AMENDED JUDGMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT EASTMAN, STEPHEN
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT EASTMAN, STEPHEN AS TO PLAINTIFF OWEN, CHARLES M
JUDGE PRO TEM STEVEN MACDONALD; CLERK JUN P. PANELO; ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE DID NOT SETTLE, TRIAL DATE OF FEBRUARY 10, 2003 REMAINS IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:00AM.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $15.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWEN, CHARLES M

JUDGE DONNA HITCHENS, CLERK NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER PATTY VAN STEENBERGE. MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2003 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON FEB-10-2003 AT 11:30 AM IN DEPT. 001, WALLACE P DOUGLASS. CASE SETTLED, SENT TO PUT THE TERMS ON THE RECORD.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT REACHED IN OPEN COURT, PRIOR TO TRIAL. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWEN, CHARLES M
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER VACATING JUDGMENT, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWEN, CHARLES M
COURT TRIAL ON FEB-10-2003 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED. WALLACE P. DOUGLASS, JUDGE; D. CARTER, CLERK; NOT REPORTED. ACCEPTED IN WRITTEN FORMAT. JUDGMENT GIVEN TO DEFENDANT AT COURT APPEARANCE.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT EASTMAN, STEPHEN
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE FILED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
